mapper.select: SELECT bwsr.NodeName, bwsr.NodeID, bwsr.ParentID, CAST(bwsr.RecState AS SMALLINT) AS RecState, bwsr.CrtUser, bwsr.CrtDate, bwsr.UData1, bwsr.UData2, bwsr.UData3, bwsr.UData4, bwsr.UData5 FROM (SELECT NodeName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, NodeID) AS NodeID, ParentID, NULL AS RecState, FOLDER.CrtUser, FOLDER.CrtDate, NULL AS UData1, NULL AS UData2, NULL AS UData3, NULL AS UData4, NULL AS UData5 FROM DIS_MMNN_BWSR_00000100 FOLDER WITH (NOLOCK) where FOLDER.BwsrType = '1' UNION (SELECT JOB.JobName AS NodeName, JOB.JobRef AS NodeID, ISNULL(RELA.BwsrID, -1) AS ParentID, 1 AS RecState, JOB.CrtUser, JOB.CrtDate, JOB.UData1, JOB.UData2, JOB.UData3, JOB.UData4, JOB.UData5 FROM (select * from DIS_MMNN_BWSR_00000200 WITH (NOLOCK) where BwsrID != 0 and TblRef = 'DIS_MMNN_MMOO_00000200') RELA RIGHT JOIN DIS_MMNN_MMOO_00000200 JOB WITH (NOLOCK) ON RELA.RecordID = JOB.RecID where JOB.MState <> '81')) bwsr
